sizing_rule.note: Reduce position size by 20% (scale_down_multiplier=0.80) when worst-case drawdown exceeds 20% or when required return after fees exceeds 35%. Also triggers on volatility-based drawdown estimates. Secondary trigger: required_return_pct = (20% + 2% + 20%) / (1 - 0.22) ≈ 30.8%, threshold is 35%.
